appleHealth.title: Apple Health
appleHealth.description: Upload your Apple Health export (.zip file)
appleHealth.instructions: On your iPhone: Health app → Profile → Export All Health Data
appleHealth.dropzone: Drop your Apple Health export here
appleHealth.acceptedFormat: Accepts .zip files from Apple Health export

googleHealth.title: Google Health Connect
googleHealth.description: Upload your Health Connect export (.json file)
googleHealth.instructions: On your Android: Health Connect app → Settings → Export data
googleHealth.dropzone: Drop your Health Connect export here
googleHealth.acceptedFormat: Accepts .json files from Health Connect export

history.title: Import History
history.deleteConfirm: Delete this import and all its {{count}} records?

privacy.message: Your data stays on this device. Nothing is uploaded to our servers.
privacy.detail: All parsing happens in your browser using a background worker.

warnings.largeFile: This is a large file ({{size}}). Import may take a few minutes.
warnings.clearData: This will add to your existing data. Duplicates are automatically detected.

errors.invalidFile: Please select a .zip file from Apple Health export.
errors.invalidJsonFile: Please select a .json file from Health Connect export.
errors.generic: Something went wrong during import. Please try again.
